prompt: create an app icon that looks like mindful pulse: heartbeat waveform morphing into a lotus, gradient sunset-peach over mint, soft clay icons style.
prompt_refined: A square app icon featuring a stylized heartbeat waveform on the left smoothly morphing into an elegant open lotus flower on the right. The entire combined form is rendered with a soft, warm gradient of sunset-peach tones, ranging from light peach to soft orange-pink. The icon is designed in a distinctive soft clay style, characterized by a smooth, matte, rounded, and three-dimensional appearance with clean, minimalist edges. The background is a solid, subtle mint green.
objects: Stylized heartbeat waveform on the left
Elegant open lotus flower on the right
Heartbeat waveform smoothly morphing into lotus flower
Soft, warm gradient of sunset-peach tones (on the combined form)
